---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / 你遇到了什么问题？

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution / 你的方案

Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives / 其他方案

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Category / 类别

- [ ] 🔌 New data source (Gemini, Copilot, DeepSeek, etc.)
- [ ] 🔍 New behavioral signal pattern
- [ ] 🌍 New language support
- [ ] 📊 Visualization / Web UI
- [ ] 🧪 New personality framework (Big Five, Enneagram, etc.)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🎯 Other

## Additional context / 补充信息

Add any other context, mockups, or references.
